name: roar-dashboard
//: overrides.axios: pinned to @openfga/sdk's exact axios pin; a newer root axios forces npm to nest a second copy,
breaking type identity in fga.client.ts and risking dual module instances at runtime. Remove when the sdk relaxes its pin.
overrides.canvas: ^3 uses ABI-stable N-API prebuilds that install on Node 24 without a native toolchain; the 2.x line
(pulled in by @jspsych-contrib/plugin-html-swipe-response, which never imports it at runtime) has no Node 24 binaries.
